church_online_platform.notes: Use Church Online Platform Admin analytics. No public reporting API confirmed.

resi.notes: Use Resi analytics export first. Public OAuth and On Demand API access is confirmed, but public analytics API endpoints were not found.

youtube.notes: Use YouTube Analytics API after OAuth setup.

facebook.notes: Use Resi social analytics or Meta Business Suite first; Graph API depends on Page permissions.

app_tv.notes: Verify whether app, Apple TV, and Roku views are counted by Resi or another source.
